title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 hands-on: Slightly thinner, but more expensive - Engadget
summary: It also arrives amid higher electronics prices and RAM shortages: the Z Flip 8 is $1,200, 100 bucks more than last year's Samsung flip phone. You're also getting the same-sized battery in the Galaxy Z Flip 8 as last year's Flip 7.
